AI operations studio

Automation systems for teams that run on too many tabs.

AstraGrid Systems builds dashboards, internal tools, workflow routing, and AI-assisted processes that turn scattered operations into one intelligent command grid.

Map your workflowView systems work
DashboardsAI assistantsInternal toolsData cleanup

Problem

Your team is not slow. The operating system around the team is fragmented.

AstraGrid finds spreadsheet detours, repeated decisions, missing data contracts, and hidden queues that keep good teams reactive.

Services

Build the operating layer your team actually uses.

Automation workflow

From raw handoffs to decision-ready control rooms.

  1. Audit workflow evidence and ownership.
  2. Design routing, dashboards, and assistive logic.
  3. Build and test the internal system.
  4. Launch with documentation and support cadence.

Featured work

Dispatch Grid Rebuild

Logistics

Reduced daily routing review from three hours to twenty minutes with a planner dashboard.

Revenue Console

Ecommerce

Unified Shopify, ad spend, support, and inventory signals into a single operating board.

Service Intake Hub

Field Service

Built a guided intake and triage system for quotes, crew scheduling, and follow-up.

CRM Rescue Sprint

B2B Services

Cleaned 18,000 records, rebuilt lifecycle logic, and restored sales pipeline visibility.

AI Assistant Panel

Operations

Created internal support prompts, context cards, and escalation flows for account managers.

Inventory Exception Monitor

Retail

Flagged stock risk, supplier lag, and fulfillment delays before customer impact.

Sharp scope

Visible limits, owners, and acceptance checks.

Clean data

Source trust, field rules, and stable naming.

Human approval

AI assistance supports accountable decisions.

Supportable launch

Documentation keeps the system useful.

Proof

"AstraGrid gave our dispatch lead a single view of every exception before the phones opened."

"The reporting rebuild made our weekly meeting shorter and much more precise."

Ecommerce founder
